thesis: Off-market underutilized parcels: built FAR < 50% of allowed, dev-friendly zones, 1.5k-40k SF lots, ≥6 buildable units.

assumptions.note: Estimates for screening/outreach only — not appraisals. Rents/costs are editable assumptions, shown in the terminal.
